summary: The diff addresses all four requirements. The backend (main.mo) implements createPost with stable storage and a setPublishedState function. The frontend hooks (useQueries.ts) replace broken publish/unpublish hooks with useSetPublishedState. CreateBlogPostPage shows error alerts and navigates on success. AdminPostsPage uses the new useSetPublishedState mutation and refetches after mutations. All four REQs appear to be substantially implemented.
